headline: Manna Air Delivery Raises $50Million Series B as It Announces Plans to Expand in the United States
summary: DUBLIN, April 01, 2026--Manna Air Delivery, a global leader in consumer drone delivery, has announced a $50 million funding round to scale its proven operations further in the United States and Europe. The round brings Manna’s total funding to $110million. Manna now operates one of the most active consumer drone delivery networks in the world, with more than 250,000 regulated commercial UAV flights completed.

headline: Why UBER Stock At $70 Is A Steal
summary: Uber Technologies (UBER) is at a compelling crossroads now. Today, you are essentially betting on a company that has successfully pivoted from a high-burn startup into a disciplined, high-margin cash flow engine. It strikes a rare balance: steady growth, healthy margins, and a low-debt capital structure, all while trading at a valuation that many consider "cheap" for a tech leader. See how Uber's valuation has changed over time.
